name: Insulin Glargine Injection
about: Insulin Glargine Injection is a liquid medication used for the treatment of type 1 and type 2 diabetes. It is a long-acting insulin analogue that helps regulate glucose levels in the blood. The dosage of this medication should be taken as per the suggestion of the healthcare provider. This insulin injection is manufactured in India and is available in a liquid form that is easy to administer. It is recommended to store this medication in a dry place. As an exporter, supplier, and trader, we provide high-quality Insulin Glargine Injection to our customers.

faq.a: Insulin Glargine Injection is used for the treatment of type 1 and type 2 diabetes.

faq.a: The dosage of Insulin Glargine Injection should be taken as per the suggestion of the healthcare provider.

faq.a: Insulin Glargine Injection is manufactured in India.

faq.q: How should Insulin Glargine Injection be stored?
faq.a: Insulin Glargine Injection should be stored in a dry place.
